sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3534 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.15466/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 16.04.2025 Mr.Daniyal Muzaffar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Ghulam Asghar Pathan, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions submits that representation under Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act shall be filed to agitate the present grievance. He seeks that the said representation be determined vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner within 10 days of the same having been preferred. He further seeks that post filing of the representation and during pendency thereof no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
